Office of the Special Adviser on Africa (OSAA),Permanent Observer Mission of the African Union -- Africa Dialogue Series 2026 high-level policy dialogue entitled “Water and Sanitation for Life: Harnessing Water Resources for the Africa We Want” (co-organized by the Office of the Special Adviser on Africa (OSAA) and the Permanent Observer Mission of the African Union, in partnership with the United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF), the Economic Commission for Africa (ECA), UN-Habitat, the African Union Development Agency, the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization (UNESCO), the African Development Bank and the Institute for Security Studies (ISS))

Leveling the Playing Field: Innovation and Intellectual Property in Sport for All” (on the occasion of World Intellectual Property Day) (26 April) (co-organized by the Permanent Mission of Monaco, the World Intellectual Property Organization (WIPO) and the Department of Economic and Social Affairs (DESA))
